Cássio Maletich

Senior Full-Stack Engineer

Ruby on Rails React JavaScript Scalable Systems

I build production systems that handle real users, real money, and real scale.

From e-commerce engines to native apps and AI-driven automation — I focus on performance, maintainability, and business impact.

Let's Build Together GitHub LinkedIn

What I Do

Full-Stack, End-to-End

Deep expertise across the entire stack — from database architecture to polished UIs and cloud infrastructure.

🧠

Backend Engineering — Ruby on Rails

  • Architect scalable Rails applications
  • Payment systems & subscription logic
  • API integrations (Amazon SP-API, DocuSign, Shopify, AI Vendors…)
  • Refactor legacy codebases safely
  • Background jobs (Sidekiq), Redis, concurrency
  • High test coverage (RSpec / TDD mindset)
⚛️

Frontend & Product — React / JavaScript

  • Production-grade React & React Native apps
  • Clean state management & component architecture
  • Performance optimization
  • UX focused on conversion
  • E-commerce flows (checkout, tax, subscriptions)
⚙️

Systems & Infrastructure

  • AWS deployments
  • CI/CD pipelines
  • Background workers & job orchestration
  • Large concurrent user bases (30k+ daily users)
  • Gradual legacy migrations without downtime

Selected Impact

Results That Ship

A sample of real-world outcomes across different domains and scales.

Found and fixed hidden checkout tax duplication in a Spree-based e-commerce flow, improving trust and revenue accuracy.
Identified and resolved a race condition causing duplicate shipment records during checkout — traced parallel service calls, implemented idempotency safeguards, and restored order integrity.
Led AI-powered scraping & document intelligence platform for investors: automated data extraction, classification, and dashboard insights from unstructured financial documents.
Built a native app MVP in 45 days after previous vendor failure — mastered React Native on the fly and delivered production-ready.
Developed a subscription gifting system integrated in the previous flow serving 30k+ concurrent Shopify users.
Migrated Amazon Marketplace API → Selling Partner API while preserving full compliance and zero downtime.

How I Work & What's Next

Engineering with Intention

How I Work

Business-first engineering Clean, pragmatic architecture Test-driven where it matters Bias for shipping Calm under production pressure

Currently Interested In

High-scale Rails systems E-commerce infrastructure AI-assisted automation Complex backend challenges

Let's build something that scales.

Open to challenging projects, consulting, and senior engineering roles.
